## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

What workflow or scientific review task would this support?

What should be included in an initial version?

## Validation Considerations

How should the result be checked or validated?

## Notes

XRD, spectral matching, and experimental modules are screening/prototype aids, not definitive expert confirmation.
